cameras.description: Entry/exit glass door — camera mounted high-left inside store looking down at glass door threshold. Purplle backlit signage left. Mall corridor visible through glass on right.

Skincare wall — top/back wall: Farmstay, The Face Shop, Good Vibes, Derma Co, Minimalist, Aqualogy, DERMDOC. Round fragrance/nail island display in foreground. Makeup trial unit visible at right edge.
Makeup/cosmetics wall — bottom/front wall: Alps, L'Oreal, 6Mars, Swiss Beauty, Lakme, FacesCanada, Maybelline. Makeup trial unit left side. Accessories display top-left corner.
Billing counter — laptop/POS desk left-center. Stockroom with inventory boxes in background center. 55-inch LED Accessories display panel on right.

entry_line.description: Glass door frame visible center-frame. Left of line (x<660) = outside mall corridor; Right (x>660) = inside store. Camera looks down from inside so corridor is on the right side of frame.

zones.name: Skincare & Face Care Wall
zones.description: Top/back wall shelves: Farmstay, The Face Shop, Good Vibes, Derma Co, Minimalist, Aqualogy, DERMDOC. Multi-tier shelf unit running full wall width.

zones.name: Skincare Browsing Aisle
zones.description: Floor standing area in front of skincare wall. Includes round fragrance/nail island display (center-bottom). Where customers physically stand while browsing skincare.

zones.name: Fragrance & Nail Island Display
zones.description: Round tiered island display unit in center of skincare aisle — Fragrance and Nail Foundation products. Visible bottom-center of CAM 1.

zones.name: Makeup Trial Unit (Skincare Camera Side)
zones.description: Makeup trial station visible at right edge of CAM 1. White unit with mirror and seating. Overlaps with CAM_FLOOR_02 coverage — Re-ID deduplication required.

zones.name: Makeup & Cosmetics Wall
zones.description: Bottom/front wall shelves: Alps, L'Oreal, 6Mars, Swiss Beauty, Lakme, FacesCanada, Maybelline. High-density makeup SKU wall.

zones.name: Makeup Browsing Aisle
zones.description: Floor standing area in front of makeup wall. Central aisle where customers browse cosmetics and interact with staff.

zones.name: Makeup Trial Unit
zones.description: White makeup trial unit with mirror — left side of CAM 2. Customer tries makeup products here with staff assistance. High-dwell zone.

zones.name: Accessories Display
zones.description: Top-left corner of CAM 2: Accessories product section visible near entry side of store.

zones.name: Billing Counter
zones.description: POS terminal / billing desk — laptop, barcode scanner, cash register. Staff stands behind counter. Customer faces counter from in-store side.

zones.name: Billing Queue / Customer Wait Area
zones.description: Center area in front of billing counter — where customers queue. Also contains some floor stock visible in footage.

zones.name: Accessories & LED Display Wall
zones.description: Right side of billing camera: large 55-inch LED panel showing accessories products. High-visibility display adjacent to billing counter.

zones.name: Stockroom / Back Office
zones.description: Background area behind billing desk — inventory boxes, back office. Visible through gap in center-background of CAM 5. Any person detected here is auto-classified is_staff=True.

camera_overlaps.description: The makeup trial unit is visible at the right edge of CAM_FLOOR_01 and left edge of CAM_FLOOR_02. Re-ID deduplication required for any person tracked in this region across both cameras.

staff_uniform_colors.description: Staff wear dark black outfits — confirmed visible in all cameras. Primary detection by very low HSV brightness (V channel).

cameras.description: Left entry glass panel — camera mounted inside store watching left glazing section (4132mm wide). Primary customer entry flow.
Right entry glass panel — camera mounted inside store watching right glazing section (4052mm wide). Secondary entry point.
Main FOH floor — wide-angle covering diagonal MK_GONDOLA shelves (left) and MAKEUP_UNIT station cluster (right). Cash counter visible in background.
Cash counter / billing area — POS terminal, 65-inch LED screen overhead. Covers billing desk and customer queue area.

entry_line.description: Left glass door. Left of line (x<640) = inside store; Right (x>640) = entrance corridor.
Right glass door. Left of line (x<640) = inside store.

zones.name: Gondola Floor Display
zones.description: Left section: two diagonal MK_GONDOLA-1 and MK_GONDOLA-2 freestanding display shelves.

zones.name: Central Browsing Aisle
zones.description: Central walkway between gondola area and makeup stations. Customer transit and dwell zone.

zones.name: Makeup Trial & Display Station
zones.description: Right section: 2x4 cluster of MAKEUP_UNIT stations with seating. High-engagement trial zone.

zones.name: Billing Counter
zones.description: Central cash counter / POS terminal. 65-inch LED screen mounted overhead.

zones.name: Billing Queue Area
zones.description: Right side of billing camera: customer waiting area near counter.

zones.name: Back of House / Stockroom
zones.description: Top strip of billing camera: B.O.H area with slotted angle racks. Any person here auto-classified is_staff=True.

camera_overlaps.description: Left entry vestibule may be partially visible at bottom-left of floor camera.
Right entry vestibule may be partially visible at bottom-right of floor camera.

staff_uniform_colors.description: Staff wear dark black outfits. Primary detection by very low HSV brightness.
